arts.ttl: Duo sacked by Stoke City drawing admiring glances from Championship rival as odds tighten
arts.sum: The Lions are looking for a new boss following the departure of club icon Harris earlier this month, and both Alex Neil and Steven Schumacher are said to be amongst the leading candidates. Two former Stoke City managers are reported to be in the frame to replace Neil Harris at Millwall.

arts.ttl: New club sets sights on Sheffield Wednesday boss Danny Rohl
arts.sum: Sheffield Wednesday boss Danny Rohl is now on the radar of managerless 2. Bundesliga giants Hamburg, according to… The post New club sets sights on Sheffield Wednesday boss Danny Rohl appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Preview: Sheffield Wednesday vs. Stoke City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Sheffield Wednesday and Stoke City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
Aidan Perkins has a score prediction for all 12 matches taking place in the Championship across another busy weekend in the second tier.
